Folks that are doing this already, that have been here longer, especially like the senior managing editors, directors that have been here, you know, and just ask questions like, you know, and seek to find like, what are the customers that doing really well?
Why are they doing really well?
Let me go look at their grid.
Let me go look at the polishing instructions.
Let me go look at all of that.
Versus like spending 10 hours doing the edit.
And then next time around, it's like do another, you know, five hours of edits.

know, great question.

basically, like, instead of trying to redo the article yourself, kind of go back to the workflow and see like, what can you improve there so that it gets it right, you know, instead of changing yourself.
I think that makes, that makes sense.
Exactly.

And so if you go back to that, it, it should, you should be able to over time understand when something is off.

And sometimes it will still require you, you know what, I'm going to go and do that, but I'm going to do a quick edit over here, and then I'm going to go try to replicate the edit I just made as well by changing these inputs here and these, like, variables and these knobs, right?

Because like, hey, I need to turn this around in that 30 minutes, fine.

And that's part of the thing we're kind of thinking through in the production.
Like, how can we, you know, if we know the next 100 assignments for every client, there's no reason we should be producing this week's assignments this week.
Never in my life with publications have my teams been working on things for the same week that we're publishing, unless it's news, right?
Like, but, but normally, like, evergreen content, because it requires research, requires time.

think I watched that in a video where you mentioned something like that, but I just wanted you to build up on that, though.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboarding session to provide context on GrowthX's strategy, vision, and approach to AI-augmented content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX aims to systematize high-quality content creation through AI-augmented workflows, enabling clients to build "authority funnels"](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [The company's approach combines first principles thinking with effective delegation to AI systems](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
  - [GrowthX is building a platform to capture editor interventions and continuously improve AI outputs](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [Team members should focus on adding value through deep understanding and context, not just surface-level edits](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Vision

  - [Marcel developed content workflows at DeepGram to systematize high-quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [GrowthX distills best practices into AI-augmented workflows to scale content production](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Goal is to help clients become publishers and build "authority funnels" to lead audiences to products](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)

### AI-Native Approach

  - [Two key skills: first principles thinking and effective delegation](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
  - [Break down tasks to core components before rebuilding with AI assistance](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Provide clear context, goals, and examples when delegating to AI systems](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Use day-to-day work as R\&D to experiment and improve processes](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)

### Platform Development

  - [Moving from Airtable/Google Docs to custom "Task Hub" with Notion-like editor](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
  - [New platform will capture editor interventions to improve AI outputs over time](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [Aim to reduce manual editing and increase automated options (e.g. choosing between AI-generated versions)](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)

### Content Quality and Editing

  - [Focus on understanding why AI outputs fall short rather than extensive manual rewrites](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)
  - [Experiment with adjusting research instructions, outlines, or polishing steps](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=2216.0)
  - [Consult with experienced team members on successful approaches for different clients](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
  - [Aim to work ahead on content rather than producing last-minute](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)

### Handling AI Limitations

  - [When stuck, leverage internal support from directors and engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=2433.0)
  - [Submit tickets for engineering investigation of persistent issues](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=2451.0)
  - [Experiment and compare to successful examples before escalating](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=2503.0)

## Next Steps

  - New team members to review additional onboarding recordings and documentation
  - [Transition to new "Task Hub" platform by June 16th](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
  - [Continue developing first principles thinking and effective AI delegation skills](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
  - [Leverage internal support channels when facing workflow challenges](https://fathom.video/share/xtWQnTowLXP_NgXdiH6z6efHw8zS-EAj?tab=summary&timestamp=2524.0)
